subject: Replace demo branding with Koinz throughout codebase
body:
- Title: NCW Web Demo → Koinz
- Theme: webDemoTheme → koinzTheme
- Storage key: DEMO_APP → KOINZ
- Icons: login-ew-icon.svg → logo.svg
- Translations: Bitvault/Embedded Wallets → Koinz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
